ct1780_init.tooltip: Initialize the CT1780 1-Wire bus object and create a cached device address.

ct1780_reset_search.tooltip: Reset 1-Wire search state to scan again from the first device.

ct1780_search_device.tooltip: Search the next CT1780 device and save its unique address to the cached address. Returns true when found.

ct1780_read_temperature.tooltip: Read Celsius temperature from the cached device address. Returns NAN on failure.

ct1780_config_addr.tooltip: Read DIP-switch configuration address from the cached device address. Returns -1 on failure.

ct1780_address_byte.tooltip: Read one byte from the cached unique address. Index range is 0-7.
